'''nodadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ycleped|ycleped]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ycleped|ycleped]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nodadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodadhithi|nodadhithi]] || [[word:nodadhiji|nodadhiji]] || [[word:nodadhishi|nodadhishi]] || [[word:nodadhiki|nodadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodadhuthuthu|nodadhuthuthu]] || [[word:nodadhujuju|nodadhujuju]] || [[word:nodadhushushu|nodadhushushu]] || [[word:nodadhukuku|nodadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodadhuthu|nodadhuthu]] || [[word:nodadhuju|nodadhuju]] || [[word:nodadhushu|nodadhushu]] || [[word:nodadhuku|nodadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodadhufthuf|nodadhufthuf]] || [[word:nodadhufjuf|nodadhufjuf]] || [[word:nodadhufshuf|nodadhufshuf]] || [[word:nodadhufkuf|nodadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodadhethe|nodadhethe]] || [[word:nodadheje|nodadheje]] || [[word:nodadheshe|nodadheshe]] || [[word:nodadheke|nodadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodadhothotho|nodadhothotho]] || [[word:nodadhojojo|nodadhojojo]] || [[word:nodadhoshosho|nodadhoshosho]] || [[word:nodadhokoko|nodadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodadhotho|nodadhotho]] || [[word:nodadhojo|nodadhojo]] || [[word:nodadhosho|nodadhosho]] || [[word:nodadhoko|nodadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodadhofthof|nodadhofthof]] || [[word:nodadhofjof|nodadhofjof]] || [[word:nodadhofshof|nodadhofshof]] || [[word:nodadhofkof|nodadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfthĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfjĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfshĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfkĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfthĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfjĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfshĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfkĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfthĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfjĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfshĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodadhĂŻfkĂŻf|nodadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodadhĂŠthĂŠ|nodadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nodadhĂŠjĂŠ|nodadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nodadhĂŠshĂŠ|nodadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nodadhĂŠkĂŠ|nodadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodadhathatha|nodadhathatha]] || [[word:nodadhajaja|nodadhajaja]] || [[word:nodadhashasha|nodadhashasha]] || [[word:nodadhakaka|nodadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodadhatha|nodadhatha]] || [[word:nodadhaja|nodadhaja]] || [[word:nodadhasha|nodadhasha]] || [[word:nodadhaka|nodadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodadhafthaf|nodadhafthaf]] || [[word:nodadhafjaf|nodadhafjaf]] || [[word:nodadhafshaf|nodadhafshaf]] || [[word:nodadhafkaf|nodadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nodadhasha|nodadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodadhshĂ«sha|nodadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodadhrosha|nodadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodadhmusha|nodadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodadhyasha|nodadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodadhnkshĂ«sha|gonodadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodadhnkrosha|gonodadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodadhnkmusha|gonodadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodadhnkyasha|gonodadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nodadadhasha|nodadadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodadadhshĂ«sha|nodadadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodadadhrosha|nodadadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodadadhmusha|nodadadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodadadhyasha|nodadadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodadadhnkshĂ«sha|gonodadadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodadadhnkrosha|gonodadadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodadadhnkmusha|gonodadadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodadadhnkyasha|gonodadadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nedĂŠdhasha|nedĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nedĂŠdhshĂ«sha|nedĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nedĂŠdhrosha|nedĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nedĂŠdhmusha|nedĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nedĂŠdhyasha|nedĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonedĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gonedĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonedĂŠdhnkrosha|gonedĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonedĂŠdhnkmusha|gonedĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonedĂŠdhnkyasha|gonedĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nodfadhasha|nodfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodfadhshĂ«sha|nodfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodfadhrosha|nodfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodfadhmusha|nodfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodfadhyasha|nodfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodfadhnkshĂ«sha|gonodfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodfadhnkrosha|gonodfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodfadhnkmusha|gonodfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodfadhnkyasha|gonodfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
